projects.title: EventualSmartFactory
projects.description: Built a production-style supply-chain intelligence dashboard with FastAPI, Neo4j, visual analytics, and an AI copilot that routes questions across Semantic RAG, GraphRAG, and Text2Cypher.

projects.title: Malware Graph Clustering with ML and GNN Embeddings
projects.description: Built a malware clustering notebook for grouping similar samples using feature preprocessing, dimensionality reduction, unsupervised learning, and graph-based malware representation ideas.

projects.title: Distributed Hash Table
projects.description: Designed a Python asyncio Kademlia-inspired DHT key-value store with PING, FIND_NODE, FIND_VALUE, STORE RPCs, XOR-distance routing, k-buckets, iterative lookup, replication, TTL, and multi-node testing.

projects.title: 0xCracker
projects.description: Built an agentic binary-analysis workflow for CTF reverse engineering and exploitation using a Dockerized Agno backend, FastMCP tool server, isolated Kali sandbox, and structured JSON outputs from 15 analysis tools.

projects.title: WoahACPU
projects.description: Built a process-scheduling simulator that visualizes how operating-system scheduling algorithms select and execute processes, with a Unity frontend and Python backend for benchmarked process generation.

projects.title: COOL Compiler
projects.description: Built a full compiler for COOL in Go, covering lexing, parsing, semantic analysis, LLVM IR generation, and optimizations such as constant propagation and dead code elimination.

projects.title: PixelLMS
projects.description: Built a full-stack learning management system with role-based access, assignment and event management, and an MVC architecture using Spring Boot, Vue.js, and SQL.

projects.title: Symbolic Control for Nonlinear Systems
projects.description: Implemented symbolic abstraction and controller synthesis for nonlinear systems, covering safety and reachability specifications.

projects.title: Faceless AI Video Generator
projects.description: Built an automation pipeline that turns online content into faceless social-media videos with generated narration, synced visuals, and export-ready output.

projects.title: Online Bookstore API
projects.description: Built a REST API in Go for managing books, authors, and sales reports, with token-based authentication, PostgreSQL persistence, middleware, and layered architecture.

projects.title: Hamming Code Error Correction in RISC-V
projects.description: Implemented Hamming-code generation, detection, and single-bit error correction in RISC-V assembly to explore low-level programming and data-integrity mechanisms.

projects.title: Traffic Simulation and Modeling
projects.description: Developed a Unity-based traffic simulation platform focused on realistic road layouts, vehicle interactions, and traffic-law modeling.

projects.title: Airnest
projects.description: Built a flight-booking system with secure transactions and database-backed booking workflows.

experiences.title: Blockchain Engineer Intern
experiences.company: UM6P College of Computing + OCP Group
experiences.description: Built a blockchain-enabled IoT system for supply-chain traceability using Hyperledger Fabric, Fabric CA, CouchDB, Node.js/Express, and Next.js. Deployed workloads on Toubkal using Apptainer and Slurm.

experiences.title: Data Science Engineer
experiences.description: Built an AI voice agent for real-estate building information using FastAPI, RAG, DuckDB, and a Pydantic validation pipeline to deliver reliable voice-driven responses.

experiences.title: Software Engineering Intern
experiences.company: Ministry of Agriculture, Maritime Fisheries, Rural Development, and Water and Forests
experiences.description: Built a platform for supervising internship projects, including task management, event planning, and progress tracking, with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL-backed services.

experiences.title: Research Contributor
experiences.description: Contributed to research on LoRaWAN security for health-data protection and on reputation systems for combating fake news and improving social-media trust.
